zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD呈现窄幅震荡偏弱结构，价格略低于74美元均线，短线多空拉锯明显，整体动能不足，市场缺乏明确方向。需关注均线压制。

技术指标显示MACD仍处正值但动能减弱，快慢线缺乏确认信号，RSI缺失使超买超卖判断受限，短线以震荡为主。需等待方向确认。

下方支撑关注73.37日内低点，上方压力位在73.78及74.46均线附近，突破均线前仍偏弱整理。多空分水岭明显。谨慎交易。

操作上建议以区间思路为主，在73.37上方轻仓低吸，接近74.46附近逐步减仓，等待趋势突破后再顺势跟进。严格止损控制风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is currently consolidating around 73.59 after a mild -0.16% daily decline, reflecting a short-term indecisive structure. Price action is tightly compressed near the 24h range low of 73.37, suggesting reduced volatility and equilibrium between buyers and sellers. However, trading remains slightly below the 20-period SMA at 74.46, indicating that the broader intraday bias is still mildly bearish until a reclaim occurs above this dynamic level.

From an indicator perspective, MACD at 0.179 shows early positive momentum, but the absence of a visible signal line limits confirmation of a full bullish crossover structure. This suggests momentum is attempting to stabilize rather than strongly trend upward. Without RSI data, overbought or oversold conditions cannot be confirmed, but price behavior near support implies a neutral-to-slightly oversold intraday condition, favoring short-term mean reversion attempts.

Key support is forming near 73.30–73.00, aligning closely with the recent 24-hour low and a psychological round zone. A breakdown below this region could expose deeper retracement toward 72.20–71.80, where prior consolidation zones may attract demand. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 74.40–74.60, coinciding with the SMA20, followed by stronger resistance near 75.20, where prior rejection pressure was observed.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy unless a decisive breakout occurs. Short-term traders may look for long entries near 73.00 support with tight risk controls, targeting a rebound toward 74.40 resistance. Conversely, rejection at the SMA20 could present short setups toward lower support zones. A sustained break above 74.60 would be required to shift momentum toward a more constructive bullish recovery phase.
